calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2020 Continued To Jun-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Continued To Mar-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tiba Aynechi in propria persona
Amir H. Salek in propria persona

The Court announces its tentative ruling, stating that these petitions to establish fact of marriage are for situations where there is no record of marriage. Ms. Aynechi stated that they want to have something offficial, that they only have a copy, that they cannot get a certified copy from the foreign ministry unless they are in person in Iran, that there is no embassy, and they don't feel safe to travel there.

The petition to establish fact of marriage is continued to March 30, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Petitioners to file supplemental declarations in support of their need to have their marriage recognized, difficulty getting official/certified record of marriage, and providing evidence i.e. photos.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: Anasse. Matter not reported.
